reviews.title: Value for money but not for light sleeper
reviews.text: I stayed in this hotel from June 17 to 19, 2024.  Room was clean and very spacious as it has a living room, small kitchen and bedroom. Since I have several suppliers in the Binh Duong area, staying here saved me time compared to staying in HCM.  Staff were also very good.  The con for this hotel is it is right beside the highway and there are vehicles travelling even between 12 midnight to early morning and they also blow their horn.  so not recommended for light sleepers.  Also, only the coffee shop is the choice for food, no other  choices for food around the hotel.  Have to take a taxi to the Aeon mall thats 5 mins away.
reviews.response:
Dear Edward,

Thank you for sharing your stay experience with us!

We are delighted that you were well looked after by our Citadines Central Binh Duong team! Your kind words will be shared with our team as receiving such feedback from residents like yourself inspires us to improve our service delivery continually.

We thank you again for choosing to stay with us and we look forward to having you back soon!

Yours sincerely,
Arlene Luong
Guest Service Manager

reviews.title: Nice place to stay
reviews.text: The hotel is nice and uses eco-friendly materials. The room is spacious and has a big drinking water jar for free. However, the tivi does not work well, the hair dryer is too small to really dry any hair.  Also, staff needs to inform guests about all the benefits they can have, for example, free parking tickets. I did not know about this until the guy at the parking lot told me.
reviews.response:
Dear Ms.Thu,
It was a great pleasure having you stay at Citadines. Than you for sharing your feedback about your stay experience with us.
I have noted your observations and recommendations for improvements to the amenities in the room as the TV works not as well and the hairdryer needs to better. Pls,be assured that I will coordinate the plans for these enhancements with the respective team members. Since we are constantly looking at ways to improve our services, following your feedback, I will focus my efforts to seek improvements in these areas 
Regrettably, I acknowledge that our guest service members did not clearly communicate about facilities and benefits during your stay with us. I will remind my staff to exercise more care and diligence to ensure that important information is conveyed and explained clearly.
Once again, thank you for staying with us. We look forward to welcoming you again, giving us another opportunity to serve you better.
Sincerely,
Lily_Guest Service Manager.

ただ、清掃面はやや不安。見た目は綺麗ですが、裸足で歩いていると足裏が真っ黒に。バスルームには、床に濡れたバスタオルがありました。

プールは、上から見ただけですが、落ち葉や外壁具剥がれたものがたくさん浮いており、子供達は泳ぎたがりませんでした。

reviews.response:
Dear In,

Thank you for sharing your feedback and for staying with us. I’m truly sorry to hear about your recent experience, especially regarding the interaction with our team. Please rest assured that this is not the level of service we strive to provide.

We’ve already followed up with the staff involved and identified a miscommunication issue, which we are addressing through additional training focused on improving both communication and guest engagement. Your comment has also been shared with our management team to ensure better consistency across all departments.

I'm glad to hear that the issue with your lost item was eventually resolved, and I appreciate your patience. We’re committed to learning from this and making meaningful improvements.

If there’s anything else we can do to make it right or assist further, please don’t hesitate to contact me directly.

Ilada Pansamdaeng
Residence Manager

reviews.title: 오픈한지 얼마 안된 레지던스
reviews.text: 객실도 너무 깨끗하고  욕실도 불편함이 없어요. 주방에도 비품들이 완벽하게 놓여져 있고 토스트기도 있어요. 작지만 베란다도 있고 세탁기. 타올. 수납공간은 정말 많아서  몇달 지내기도 좋은거같아요.커피를 마실수 있는 장소도 2층에 예쁜 인테리어가 되어 있는 방도 있고. 헬스장도 모든게 새거라 아주 좋아요. 직원분들도 친철하구요.  단점으로는 주변 상권이  아무것도 없어요. 식당도 편의점도 없어요. 다행이 셔틀이 있어 이온몰 가서 필요한 물품을 사와야해요.1층에 자그만한 커피샵과 레스토랑이 있긴한데 너무 작아요. 제일 큰 단점은 수영장이 멋지게 있긴한데 주변건물들에 가려서 추워요.태닝은 아주 힘들어요.아직도 공사중이라 조금 어수선한데  좋아지겠죠.하지만 수영장은 위치를 바꿀수도 없고 계속  추울거같아요.수영장에 있으면 햇볕이 그리워요.ㅜㅜ
